# Wiki Changelog

## 2026-05-12 — `1e833665` — Initial generation

**Branch:** `claude/code-wiki-generator-YIV8v`
**Generated by:** Claude (Opus 4.7) one-shot wiki pipeline
**Trigger:** Manual user request — initial seeding of `docs/wiki/`

### Sections created
- `INDEX.md`, `REGEN.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, `RISKS.md`, `SEARCH.md`
- `overview/` — 4 files
- `architecture/` — 8 files
- `subsystems/` — 10 files
- `integrations/` — 8 files
- `platform/` — 3 files (Capacitor stub references `chravel-mobile` sister repo)
- `testing/` — 3 files
- `diagrams/` — 11 `.mmd` source files
- `deck/` — 2 files (outline + Gamma-paste markdown)

### Verified at this SHA
- 1,105 .ts/.tsx files under `src/`
- 88 edge functions under `supabase/functions/`
- 358 SQL migrations under `supabase/migrations/`
- 215 unique tables, 824 RLS policies
- 107 hooks, 80 services, 6 Zustand stores, 6 feature modules
- 33 lazy routes + 1 legacy redirect
- ~94 environment variables across 10+ SaaS integrations

### Notes / deferrals
- `deck.pptx` not generated — `python-pptx` unavailable in regen env. Gamma-paste flow documented in [`REGEN.md`](./REGEN.md).
- Capacitor / native iOS docs are **stubs** — native shell lives in `chravel-mobile` sister repo.
- Field-drift sweep scoped to **top 10 entities** (Trip, TripMember, Message, Broadcast, CalendarEvent, Payment, Receipt, Profile, Task, Poll). Full 215-table sweep deferred — see `RISKS.md` follow-up prompt.
- No `src/` files were modified during this pass.
